name: Licking Limosne & Limo-Buses

No web footprint found for this DBA - likely a very small intrastate limo/limo-bus operator using P.O. Box 115 mailing address.

name: Early Riser Transportation
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches on EARLY RISER and EARLY RISER TRANSPORTATION returned zero records. The only EARLY RISERS match in SAFER is in COLQUITT GA (USDOT 2242760). A separate EARLY RISERS TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3970708) exists in Van Buren Twp MI - confirmed as general freight (property) carrier with 2 power units, MC-1483671, principal Roderick Gaston II - different operator and freight not passengers, so NOT a match. Yelp lists 'Early Riser Transportation' at 20179 Coventry St (matches input address) as CLOSED. Phone (313) 893-8720. No further Michigan LARA confirmation available via WebFetch (endpoint refused). Likely a defunct intrastate transport business.
